name: freelancenearme
description: Freelance Near Me — TypeScript React (Next.js) marketplace; legacy PHP archived

scripts.env:example: cp -n apps/web/.env.example apps/web/.env 2>/dev/null || cp apps/web/.env.example apps/web/.env; grep '^DATABASE_URL=' apps/web/.env | head -1 > packages/database/.env; echo 'Wrote apps/web/.env and packages/database/.env — edit DATABASE_URL then npm run db:push && npm run db:seed'
